ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Continued To Jul-21-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via ZOOM, for Londa Briscoe, Administrator.

The court begins by confirming with counsel that a petition is pending in the court's electronic filing queue for review and thus, has not yet been filed and a courtesy copy delivered to the court for review.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to July 21, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
